title: Assumption
description: A stated premise, required to cite the evidence that grounds it. Field names here match the actual AssumptionDeclared runtime payload (src/cli.js assumptionDeclare, src/validator.js validateAssumptionDeclared) rather than the snake_case convention used by evidence.json and claim.json, which has drifted from runtime. See the schemas/v0-vs-runtime sync item before treating any sibling file in this directory as ground truth.
